---
title: "Data Lab"
format: html
---

Interactive tools for analysing labour market indicators, social economy trends, and occupational accident statistics.

::: {.tool-grid}

::: {.tool-card}
### Labour Market Data

Interactive tools for labour force participation, employment, and unemployment indicators.

[Open Tool](./labour-market.html){.tool-link}
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### Social Economy Data

Interactive visualisations for cooperatives, social enterprises, and ecosystem indicators.

[Open Tool](./social-economy.html){.tool-link}
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### Occupational Accident Data

Dynamic tools for accident trends, sectoral comparisons, and safety indicators.

[Open Tool](./occupational-accidents.html){.tool-link}
:::

:::
